name: Accidental Whole Wheat Herb Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 can V-8 juice (11.5 oz) or tomato juice
1/2 cup Scallions, minced or fresh chives in amounts to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together juice, eggs, water, cottage cheese, scallions and dill.
2. Heat the mixture in a microwave to 125-130 degrees using a thermometer.
3. Combine whole wheat flour, 5 cups of white flour, yeast, and sugar in a large bowl.
4. Gradually mix the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until combined.
5. Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5-8 minutes until smooth and elastic.
6. Place the dough in an oiled bowl, cover with a towel, and let rest for 10 minutes.
7. Divide the dough evenly between two loaf pans (5 x 9 inches).
8. Cover the pans with plastic wrap sprayed with non-stick vegetable spray.
9. Place the pans in a warm place and let rise for 20 minutes.
10. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C).
11. Bake until the loaves sound hollow when tapped, about 25 minutes.
12. Remove from loaf pans and cool on a rack.
